prediction.reason: Mercedes enters the 2026 regulation era with a 'huge' technical advantage, as evidenced by George Russell's victory in the Australian season opener. Ferrari is emerging as their primary challenger, with Lewis Hamilton and Charles Leclerc finishing 3rd and 4th in Melbourne. With Ferrari introducing an innovative rotating rear wing in Shanghai—a track where Hamilton holds the record for most wins—the Scuderia is well-positioned to challenge for the podium, while reigning champion Lando Norris admits McLaren still needs to 'step it up' to match the front-running pace.
